trigger_keywords: color marrón dorado y aromas a frutos secos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: White wine is exposed to excessive oxygen during production, storage, or service.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Oxidative reactions consume fresh aroma compounds and darken phenolic pigments.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine becomes gold-brown and develops bruised-fruit or nutty aromas while losing freshness.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine becomes gold-brown and develops bruised-fruit or nutty aromas while losing freshness.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
